source_pr.title: test: make TestFromUnixTime stable in different timezone
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Problem Summary: parser's circleci test use different timezone cause test fail in TestFromUnixTime https://circleci.com/gh/pingcap/parser/5283?utm_campaign=vcs-integration-link&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github-build-link ### What is changed and how it works? What's Changed: fix timezone as UTC when running this test. ### Related changes - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch(need help 3.0/3.1 parser CI) ### Check List Tests - Unit test Side effects - only test code ### Release note n/a --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/16692)

evidence: evidence: PR title: make TestFromUnixTime stable in different timezone.
evidence: forces sc.TimeZone=time.UTC and updates expected strings to remove dependence on local timezone (expression/builtin_time_test.go).
